en.title: Exploring Life & Business with Rahi Manavi of Caspian Coast Coffee
en.excerpt: Voyage LA sits down with Rahi Manavi to explore the story behind Caspian Coast Coffee — from family heritage and a homeland left behind to building a Persian café on Main Street in Venice.
en.body:
Voyage LA sits down with Rahi Manavi to explore the story behind Caspian Coast Coffee — from family heritage and a homeland left behind to building a Persian café on Main Street in Venice.

Read the full story at Voyage LA.
